answer_json.answer: 记录R004231（员工李丽娟/E0007，信息技术部）费用日期2025-08-02，报销日期2025-11-30，间隔120天，超出《XX证券费用报销管理办法(2025修订版)》第七条规定的60天报销期限，属于超期报销异常，且未取得专项审批。

citations.clause_no: 费用报销管理办法-第七条

final_text:
Based on my findings, I have a complete picture of the anomaly. Let me summarize what I found:

**Record R004231**:
- Employee E0007 (李丽娟, 部门经理, 信息技术部)
- Expense date: 2025-08-02
- Reimbursement date: 2025-11-30 (120 days later)
- Reason note: "超期报销注入样本5"
- Policy Article 7: 60-day limit for reimbursement

The expense was incurred on 2025-08-02 and submitted for reimbursement on 2025-11-30, which is **120 days** after the expense date — far exceeding the **60-day limit** stipulated in Article 7 of the expense reimbursement policy. The record note itself confirms this is an overdue reimbursement test case. There is no special approval (special_approval = 0).
